metadata.title: Baburra.io - Track KOL Investment Ideas
metadata.description: Baburra.io helps you track KOL investment opinions, calculate average return rates, and compare predictions with actual price trends via candlestick charts

ai.argumentComingSoon: Argument analysis is under development. This feature will automatically extract and categorize investment arguments from posts.

metrics.title: Performance Metrics
metrics.insufficientDataTooltip: At least {min} resolved posts (wins + losses) are required before derived metrics are shown.
metrics.sqrExplainer: SQR (Signal Quality Ratio) measures how consistently a KOL's signals beat noise. SQR > 1.0 is excellent.

formulaTooltip.avgExcessWin:
Avg Excess Win = mean(σ-normalised return) over winning samples
= {value}σ
Average σ overshoot when winning.
formulaTooltip.avgExcessLose:
Avg Excess Loss = mean(σ-normalised return) over losing samples
= {value}σ
Average σ adverse move when losing.
